turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Hi. I am looking for support for depression.  My fiance died four years ago today and I am very sad.

results.term: Very sad.  I think about him often.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Very sad.  I think about him often.

results.term: I'm so sorry.  It is very hard, isn't it?  I know ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I'm so sorry.  It is very hard, isn't it?  I know time is helping, but sometimes, like today, it's just overwhelming how much I miss him.

results.term: Yes, I do try.  Thank you.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Yes, I do try.  Thank you.

results.term: May I ask what helped you move forward?

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: May I ask what helped you move forward?

results.term: Some of my favorites are playing games together or...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Some of my favorites are playing games together or watching movies.  Curling up on the couch. He had kidney failure, so we didn't do much outside, but spent as much time together as we could. He used to call me his sunshiney baby doll.  Whenever I see sunflowers I think of him.

results.term: But most of all, it was that he loved me.  He love...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: But most of all, it was that he loved me.  He loved me for me ... he didn't want me to be anyone or anything else. That was a miracle.

results.term: actually i am feeling somewhat better.  still sad,...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: actually i am feeling somewhat better.  still sad, but it's good to remember those things.  thank you.

results.term: i appreciate your time and understanding.  I hope ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: i appreciate your time and understanding.  I hope you are able to remember your good times as well.

results.term: i've been trying to figure out a hobby ... but i h...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: i've been trying to figure out a hobby ... but i haven't really found anything that appeals to me.  a cooking class sounds interesting though. i might learn how to do things in the kitchen without injuring myself.

results.term: I tend to be clumsy at the best of times and have ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I tend to be clumsy at the best of times and have done things such as (most recently) dropping a scalding bowl of chili on my foot.  I tend to wait to do new things til the last injury heals.

results.term: hmmm.  i love tacos.  and stews.  cheesecake.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: hmmm.  i love tacos.  and stews.  cheesecake.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: i used to bake ... but i'm diabetic so that's probably not such a good idea any more.  and since we're working at home now i can't bake and take it into the office for people to enjoy

results.term: oh my yes, the Cheesecake Factory has amazing chee...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: oh my yes, the Cheesecake Factory has amazing cheesecake.

results.term: I am going to go now. Thank you very much for your...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I am going to go now. Thank you very much for your support. It helps to have an "ear" ... just to be able to talk about it and be reminded that it's all going to be okay.  Plus, that there's cheesecake in the world, so it can't all be bad, right?
